title: Ban Bueng Phra Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ban Bueng Phra, with a Z-Score of +4.57. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ban Bueng Phra is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 60%, and the wind speed is 5.6 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief from the heat. 
 The city is experiencing a critical heat wave situation, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) and a significant CDD value, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the public and infrastructure.
